
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Pig|kanji=乙亥|romaji=kinoto i|onyomi=otsugai|p=yǐhài|w=i-hai|mi=i²¹ xaɪ̯⁵³|y=jyut6 hoi6|j=jyut6 hoi6|ci=jyt̚ hɐi²|mc=ʔit ɣəiH|oc-bs=Ɂik ɢˤəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as 乙亥''' (kinotoi (乙亥), otsubokunoinoshishi (乙亥), itsugai (乙亥)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=丙子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Etsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} signifies yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the element represented by the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Pig (zodiac)|en|Pig (zodiac)|qid=Q877261|lt=Pig (亥)|1=Pig (zodiac)}} signifies yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}, i.e. Water generates Wood).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Pig (乙亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: ikki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulhae (을해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Hợi

==Years of Yin Wood Pig==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 15 when divided by 60 is a year of Etsugai ({{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Etsugai (乙亥の年)'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 15|en|AD 15|qid=Q23591|lt=15 AD|1=AD 15}}
* {{ill|AD 75|en|AD 75|qid=Q30409|lt=75 AD|1=AD 75}}
* {{ill|AD 135|en|AD 135|qid=Q31346|lt=135 AD|1=AD 135}}
* {{ill|195|en|195|qid=Q33212|lt=195 AD|1=195}}
* {{ill|255|en|255|qid=Q32344|lt=255 AD|1=255}}
* {{ill|315|en|315|qid=Q32437|lt=315 AD|1=315}}
* {{ill|375|en|375|qid=Q34902|lt=375 AD|1=375}}
* {{ill|435|en|435|qid=Q31141|lt=435 AD|1=435}}
* {{ill|495|en|495|qid=Q30806|lt=495 AD|1=495}}
* {{ill|555|en|555|qid=Q30473|lt=555 AD|1=555}}
* {{ill|615|en|615|qid=Q33267|lt=615 AD|1=615}}
* {{ill|675|en|675|qid=Q30523|lt=675 AD|1=675}}
* {{ill|735|en|735|qid=Q23576|lt=735 AD|1=735}}
* {{ill|795|en|795|qid=Q30447|lt=795 AD|1=795}}
* {{ill|855|en|855|qid=Q25073|lt=855 AD|1=855}}
* {{ill|915|en|915|qid=Q24031|lt=915 AD|1=915}}
* {{ill|975|en|975|qid=Q23737|lt=975 AD|1=975}}
|
* {{ill|1035|en|1035|qid=Q19325|lt=1035 AD|1=1035}}
* {{ill|1095|en|1095|qid=Q19480|lt=1095 AD|1=1095}}
* {{ill|1155|en|1155|qid=Q19650|lt=1155 AD|1=1155}}
* {{ill|1215|en|1215|qid=Q5366|lt=1215 AD|1=1215}}
* {{ill|1275|en|1275|qid=Q5529|lt=1275 AD|1=1275}}
* {{ill|1335|en|1335|qid=Q6011|lt=1335 AD|1=1335}}
* {{ill|1395|en|1395|qid=Q6400|lt=1395 AD|1=1395}}
* {{ill|1455|en|1455|qid=Q6480|lt=1455 AD|1=1455}}
* {{ill|1515|en|1515|qid=Q6208|lt=1515 AD|1=1515}}
* {{ill|1575|en|1575|qid=Q6688|lt=1575 AD|1=1575}}
* {{ill|1635|en|1635|qid=Q6879|lt=1635 AD|1=1635}}
* {{ill|1695|en|1695|qid=Q7696|lt=1695 AD|1=1695}}
* {{ill|1755|en|1755|qid=Q7627|lt=1755 AD|1=1755}}
* {{ill|1815|en|1815|qid=Q6948|lt=1815 AD|1=1815}}
* {{ill|1875|en|1875|qid=Q7764|lt=1875 AD|1=1875}}
* {{ill|1935|en|1935|qid=Q18658|lt=1935 AD|1=1935}}
* {{ill|1995|en|1995|qid=Q2068|lt=1995 AD|1=1995}}
|
* {{ill|2055 AD|ja|2055年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2055|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2055 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2115 AD|ja|2115年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2115|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2115 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2175 AD|ja|2175年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2175|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2175 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2235 AD|ja|2235年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2235|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2235 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2295 AD|ja|2295年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2295|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2295 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2355 AD|ja|2355年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2355|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2355 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2415 AD|ja|2415年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2415|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2415 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2475 AD|ja|2475年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2475|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2475 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2535 AD|ja|2535年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2535|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2535 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2595 AD|ja|2595年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2595|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2595 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2655 AD|ja|2655年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2655|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2655 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2715 AD|ja|2715年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2715|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2715 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2775 AD|ja|2775年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2775|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2775 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2835 AD|ja|2835年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2835|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2835 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2895 AD|ja|2895年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2895|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2895 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2955 AD|ja|2955年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2955|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2955 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|qid=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|qid=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|qid=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Hando|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11571306}} period.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Wood Pig|qq=ja|乙亥|qq=Yin Wood Pig|version=99467301|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062067|af|Houtvark (astrologie)|cdo|Ĭk-hâi|de|Holz-Schwein|fr|Cochon de bois|hak|Yet-hoi|ja|乙亥|ko|을해|nds|Holt-Swien|vi|Ất Hợi|za|Iethaih|zh-min-nan|It-hāi|zh-yue|乙亥|zh|乙亥|zh-min-nan|Īt-chik|cdo|Ék-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Varkvi|de|Yin Wood Pig|de|Holz-Schweineen|en|Wood Pig|fr|Cochon de boisboishak|it|Yit-chṳ́id|za|Yitceij|ar|Yin Wood Pig}}
[[Category: ]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
